sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62232" key="leimwnh/rhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λειμων-ήρης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n62232.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">belonging to a meadow</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">βοτάνη</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </cit> </sense> </entryFree>
